caption: A man with dark hair and facial stubble is recorded in a studio setting against a dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He is wearing a black zip-up jacket over a grey shirt and large black over-ear headphones. Positioned directly in front of his face is a professional silver and black condenser microphone on a boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his head. He begins by looking slightly to the left with a neutral expression, then shifts his gaze upward and to the right with a slight smile and raised eyebrows. He then looks back toward the left, momentarily glancing downward, before ending the sequence by looking back toward the right. His facial expressions shift subtly as he speaks into the microphone, but his position and attire remain constant across the scene.
